The '''Jovan Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located in the [[Jovan system/Legends|Jovan system]].<ref name="RFS" />

==History==
The Jovan Station was the primary [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and was a stopping point for travelers from [[Phindar/Legends|Phindar]] to the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]].<ref name="Y:DR" /> It was a very important element in the commerce of the Jovan system. Eight [[Bulk freighter/Legends|bulk freighters]], and later [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]], could dock at the station simultaneously.<ref name="TEA" />

[[File:Admirals_plot.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|admirals]] [[Mission to Fondor (Galactic Civil War)|plot]] in the Jovan station.]]

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] bought the [[B-7 light freighter]] ''[[Nighthawk]]'' in a junkyard on Jovan Station.<ref name="Y:DR">''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''</ref>

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Jovan Station became the headquarters of Admiral [[Amise Griff]]'s [[Yavin blockade|blockade]] of the neighboring [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]].<ref name="RFS" /> This seriously affected the commerce of the entire [[Star system/Legends|system]].<ref name="TEA" />
